name: auto-model-router
description: OpenAI-compatible router that auto-switches across OpenRouter and HuggingFace free models when rate/usage limits are exceeded.

scripts.test: node test/fallback.test.mjs && node test/rpm.test.mjs && node test/completions.test.mjs && node test/admin.test.mjs && node test/keys.test.mjs && node test/reorder.test.mjs && node test/edit-test.test.mjs && node test/history.test.mjs && node test/requested-model.test.mjs && node test/messages.test.mjs
